name: Rewrite Chain
description: Safe synthetic benchmark scaffold for evaluating multi-step rewrite consistency.

levels.name: 2-step rewrite
levels.description: Applies two ordered deterministic rewrite steps to produce a final text.

levels.name: 4-step rewrite
levels.description: Applies four ordered deterministic rewrite steps with mixed operations.

levels.name: 6-step rewrite
levels.description: Applies six ordered deterministic rewrite steps for deeper chain consistency checks.
